content.speakerText: I’ll have the contract emailed to you by 5 PM today — feel free to call if anything’s unclear.
content.speakerTextCn: 合同今天下午5点前发你邮箱，有疑问随时打电话。
expectedAnswers: Perfect — I’ll review it first thing tomorrow. Thanks for your patience!
Got it. I’ll reach out if I have questions — really appreciate your promptness.
Thank you! I’ll go through it tomorrow morning and confirm by email.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确回应了收到信息并承诺后续行动
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当，无中式英语
表达自然度：语气礼貌、积极，符合职场语境
关键词覆盖：使用了 'review', 'tomorrow', 'appreciate', 'patience' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: Safe travels back — and again, thanks for coming all the way here.
content.speakerTextCn: 回程一路平安，再次感谢你专程赶来。
expectedAnswers: Thanks! I’ll keep you posted on the review — and I hope we’ll collaborate again soon.
I really appreciate that. Looking forward to our next meeting!
Thank you — have a great day, and let’s stay in touch!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：回应了关心与感谢，并表达未来联系的意愿
语言准确性：使用了正确动词搭配（keep you posted, stay in touch）
表达自然度：语气真诚温暖，避免机械或冷淡回应
关键词覆盖：使用了 'appreciate', 'keep you posted', 'next meeting', 'stay in touch' 等核心表达

content.speakerText: We’ve finalized the terms — I’ll send the signed documents by end of day.
content.speakerTextCn: 我们已敲定条款，我今天结束前会发送签署的文件。
expectedAnswers: Excellent! I’ll confirm receipt as soon as I get them. Looking forward to our next steps.
Thanks for your efficiency — I’m confident this will move forward smoothly.
Appreciate the quick turnaround. Let’s plan a quick call next week to align on implementation.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：认可对方行动并主动展望后续合作
语言准确性：使用了地道表达如 'quick turnaround', 'align on', 'move forward'
表达自然度：语调积极，无过度承诺或生硬套话
关键词覆盖：包含 'appreciate', 'confirm', 'next steps', 'align', 'smoothly' 等商务关键词
